---
name: Feature Request 💡
about: Suggest a new idea or improvement for Mivio
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I'm frustrated when...")

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the user experience and how it fits into the premium Mivio Android application.

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Target Form Factors**
Which form factors will benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Mobile (Phones)
- [ ] Tablets & Foldables
- [ ] Android TV / Google TV
- [ ] Android Auto
- [ ] All Form Factors

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, designs, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
